intro: This week on InstantViral Learn: How to Measure Social Media ROI. Define the outcome first (leads, sales assist, support deflection), assign attribution rules you can defend, and separate leading indicators from lagging revenue. Avoid invented ROI percentages.
mainSummary: Define the outcome first (leads, sales assist, support deflection), assign attribution rules you can defend, and separate leading indicators from lagging revenue. Avoid invented ROI percentages.
